name: resource-drugs
description: Aggregates public drug databases for quick drug, compound, labeling, clinical-trial, and repurposing retrieval.

resources.label: ChEMBL
resources.description: Bioactive molecule records with drug-like properties via ChEMBL web services.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Molecule name, synonym, target, or ChEMBL query text.

resources.label: PubChem
resources.description: Chemical compound identifiers and properties via PubChem PUG REST and NCBI E-utilities.
riskNotes: Read-only public NCBI/PubChem APIs; optional NCBI credentials are projected only when configured.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Compound name, synonym, formula, or PubChem text query.

resources.label: Broad Repurposing Hub
resources.description: Drug repurposing annotations including clinical phase, mechanism of action, targets, disease area, and indication.
riskNotes: Read-only public Broad Repurposing Hub annotation table; Broad notes the data is for research use only.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Drug, target, mechanism of action, disease area, or indication text.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum matched table rows to return.

resources.label: openFDA
resources.description: FDA drug labeling, adverse event, and Drugs@FDA records via openFDA drug APIs.
riskNotes: Read-only public openFDA APIs; openFDA data is unvalidated and not clinical advice.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Drug, label, sponsor, adverse-event, or application text.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: Optional openFDA drug API endpoint: label (default), event, or drugsfda.

resources.label: ClinicalTrials.gov
resources.description: Clinical study records and intervention metadata via the ClinicalTrials.gov API v2.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Drug, intervention, condition, sponsor, or study keyword.

resources.label: DailyMed
resources.description: FDA Structured Product Labeling records via DailyMed web services.

interface.shortDescription: ChEMBL, PubChem, Broad Repurposing Hub, openFDA, ClinicalTrials.gov, and DailyMed retrieval
interface.longDescription: Aggregates six public drug data resources for fast search/query/fetch of drug-like molecules, chemical properties, drug repurposing annotations, FDA labels/events, clinical studies, and SPL labels.
defaultPrompt: Search ChEMBL, PubChem, openFDA, ClinicalTrials.gov, DailyMed, or Broad Repurposing Hub for aspirin.
Fetch a ChEMBL ID, PubChem CID, NCT ID, DailyMed setid, or openFDA record through the drug database plugin.
